zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholemew Dillon於1478年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 米亞斯時，他的父親Sir James Dillon52歲，母親Elizabeth Bathe19歲。他於1503年與Elizabeth Barnewall在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1533年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartholemew Dillon于1478年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 米亞斯时，他的父亲Sir James Dillon52岁，母亲Elizabeth Bathe19岁。他于1503年与Elizabeth Barnewall在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1533年在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

variants.name: Delon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillion
meanings: Irish and English: possibly a variant of   Dillon  .

variants.name: Dillow
meanings: English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded as Delewe in 1295 and Dylewe in 1334. Compare Dillon 2.

nameMeanings.name: Bartholemew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholemew Dillon was born in 1478, in Diocese of Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir James Dillon, was 52 and his mother, Elizabeth Bathe, was 19. He married Elizabeth Barnewall in 1503, in County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1533, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartholemew Dillon est né en 1478, à Diocese of Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir James Dillon, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bathe, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Barnewall en 1503, à County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1533, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bartholemew Dillon 1478 in Diocese of Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Dillon 52 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Bathe 19. Er hat 1503 in County Meath, Irland Elizabeth Barnewall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1533 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholemew Dillon è nato il nel 1478 nel Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir James Dillon, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Bathe, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Barnewall nel 1503, nel County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1533, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bartholemew Dillonが1478年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ メアスで生まれた時，父Sir James Dillonは52歳，母Elizabeth Batheは19歳であった。1503年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスでElizabeth Barnewallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1533年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholemew Dillon(이)가 1478년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Dillon(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Bathe(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1503년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 Elizabeth Barnewall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1533년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholemew Dillon nasceu em 1478, em Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir James Dillon, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bathe, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Barnewall em 1503, em County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1533, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholemew Dillon родился в 1478 г. в местности диосес оф мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir James Dillon было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bathe, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Barnewall в 1503 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1533 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bartholemew Dillon nació en 1478, en Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir James Dillon, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bathe, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Barnewall en 1503, en County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1533, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
